user.title: Connect to Control D
user.description: Enter a Control D API token to create one Home Assistant config entry for one authenticated Control D instance.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the Control D API. Check network access and any token IP restrictions, then try again.
error.invalid_auth: The Control D API token was rejected. Check that the token is valid and has the required scope.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred while validating the Control D API token.

abort.already_configured: This Control D instance is already configured.
abort.not_implemented: Control D Manager is currently a scaffold-only repository. The production config flow has not been implemented yet.

init.title: Control D settings
init.description: What would you like to configure?

data_description.managed_in_home_assistant: Turn off to exclude this profile and remove its entities from Home Assistant.
data_description.expose_external_filters: Create disabled-by-default entities for available 3rd-party filters while still keeping them available to services either way.
data_description.advanced_profile_options: Create the remaining profile option entities for this profile in disabled-by-default state.
data_description.endpoint_sensors_enabled: Create telemetry entities for devices under this profile.
data_description.endpoint_inactivity_threshold_minutes: How long before an endpoint is marked as inactive.
data_description.allowed_service_categories: Select which service categories to create in Home Assistant. New entities from these categories are created disabled by default due to high count in some categories.
data_description.exposed_custom_rules: Select specific custom rule folders or domains to expose as switches.

data_description.configuration_sync_interval_minutes: How often to fetch structural changes such as new rules and services. Default: 15.
data_description.profile_analytics_interval_minutes: How often to fetch high-level query and block counts. Default: 5.
data_description.endpoint_analytics_interval_minutes: How often to fetch granular device-level telemetry. Default: 5.

config_entry_not_found.message: The selected Control D config entry could not be found.

config_entry_name_not_found.message: The selected Control D config entry name could not be found.

config_entry_name_ambiguous.message: More than one Control D config entry has that name. Use the config entry ID instead.

config_entry_not_loaded.message: The selected Control D config entry is not currently loaded.

multiple_entries_loaded.message: More than one Control D config entry is loaded. Select a specific config entry or select profiles by ID or name.

wrong_integration_entry.message: The selected config entry does not belong to Control D Manager.

profile_target_required.message: Select at least one Control D profile by ID or name.

filter_target_required.message: Select at least one Control D filter by ID or name.

profile_target_not_found.message: The selected Control D profile target could not be resolved.

profile_target_ambiguous.message: The selected Control D profile target is ambiguous or belongs to a different config entry.

filter_name_not_found.message: The selected Control D filter target could not be resolved for one or more targeted profiles.

filter_name_ambiguous.message: The selected Control D filter target matches more than one filter. Use raw filter IDs when names are ambiguous.

service_target_required.message: Select at least one Control D service by ID or name.

service_name_not_found.message: The selected Control D service target could not be resolved for one or more targeted profiles.

service_name_ambiguous.message: The selected Control D service target matches more than one service. Use raw service IDs when names are ambiguous.

rule_group_target_required.message: Select at least one Control D rule group by ID or name.

rule_group_name_not_found.message: The selected Control D rule-group target could not be resolved for one or more targeted profiles.

rule_group_name_ambiguous.message: The selected Control D rule-group target matches more than one folder. Use raw rule-group IDs when names are ambiguous.

rule_target_required.message: Select at least one Control D rule by identity or hostname.

rule_name_not_found.message: The selected Control D rule target could not be resolved for one or more targeted profiles. Use the full rule identity when a bare hostname is not unique.

rule_name_ambiguous.message: The selected Control D rule target matches more than one rule. Use raw rule identities when a bare hostname is ambiguous.

option_target_required.message: Select at least one Control D profile option by ID or title.

option_name_not_found.message: The selected Control D profile-option target could not be resolved for one or more targeted profiles.

option_name_ambiguous.message: The selected Control D profile-option target matches more than one option. Use raw option IDs when titles are ambiguous.

disable_profiles_failed.message: Unable to disable the targeted Control D profiles.

enable_profiles_failed.message: Unable to enable the targeted Control D profiles.

set_default_rules_failed.message: Unable to update the selected Control D default rule settings.

set_filters_failed.message: Unable to update the targeted Control D filters.

set_options_failed.message: Unable to update the selected Control D profile options.

set_rules_failed.message: Unable to update the targeted Control D rules.

rule_mutation_required.message: Provide at least one rule mutation field such as Enabled, Mode, Comment, Cancel expiration, Expiration duration, or Expire at.

option_mutation_required.message: Provide a compatible mutation for the selected Control D profile options.

set_services_failed.message: Unable to update the targeted Control D services.

service_mode_rejected.message: Control D rejected the requested service mode for one or more targeted services.

filter_not_found.message: Unable to find the selected Control D filter.

filter_mode_update_failed.message: Unable to update the Control D filter mode.

service_not_found.message: Unable to find the selected Control D service.

service_update_failed.message: Unable to update the Control D service.

default_rule_mode_unsupported.message: Unsupported Control D default rule mode.

default_rule_not_found.message: Unable to find the selected Control D default rule.

default_rule_update_failed.message: Unable to update the Control D default rule.

rule_group_mode_unsupported.message: Unsupported Control D folder rule mode.

rule_group_not_found.message: Unable to find the selected Control D folder.

rule_group_update_failed.message: Unable to update the Control D folder rule.

option_not_found.message: Unable to find the selected Control D option.

option_update_failed.message: Unable to update the Control D option.

disable_profile_failed.message: Unable to disable the Control D profile.

enable_profile_failed.message: Unable to enable the Control D profile.

enable_filter_failed.message: Unable to enable the Control D filter.

disable_filter_failed.message: Unable to disable the Control D filter.

enable_rule_failed.message: Unable to enable the Control D rule.

disable_rule_failed.message: Unable to disable the Control D rule.

enable_option_failed.message: Unable to enable the Control D option.

disable_option_failed.message: Unable to disable the Control D option.

disable_profile.name: Disable profile
disable_profile.description: Temporarily disable all filters, services and rules for one or more Control D profiles.

profile_id.name: Select a profile
profile_id.description: Required unless you provide Profile names. Select one or more managed Control D profiles by ID. If Profile IDs and Profile names are both provided, Profile IDs take precedence.

profile_name.name: Profile names
profile_name.description: Required unless you select a profile by ID. Enter one or more managed Control D profile names, separated by commas, such as Primary,Kids.

minutes.name: Minutes
minutes.description: How long to keep the selected profiles disabled.

config_entry_id.name: Configuration Entry ID
config_entry_id.description: Optional. Only needed when more than one Control D integration is loaded. If both Configuration Entry ID and Configuration Entry name are provided, Configuration Entry ID takes precedence.

config_entry_name.name: Configuration Entry name
config_entry_name.description: Optional. Only needed when more than one Control D integration is loaded and you are not using Configuration Entry ID.

enable_profile.name: Enable profile
enable_profile.description: Re-enable one or more previously disabled Control D profiles immediately.

profile_id.name: Select a profile
profile_id.description: Required unless you provide Profile Names. Select one or more managed Control D profiles by ID. If Profile IDs and Profile Names are both provided, Profile IDs take precedence.

profile_name.name: Profile names
profile_name.description: Required unless you select a profile by ID. Enter one or more managed Control D profile names, separated by commas, such as Primary,Kids.

config_entry_id.name: Configuration Entry ID
config_entry_id.description: Optional. Only needed when more than one Control D integration is loaded. If both Configuration Entry ID and Configuration Entry name are provided, Configuration Entry ID takes precedence.

config_entry_name.name: Configuration Entry name
config_entry_name.description: Optional. Only needed when more than one Control D integration is loaded and you are not using Configuration Entry ID.

set_filter_state.name: Set filter state
set_filter_state.description: Enable or disable one or more Control D filters by raw key or user-facing name across the selected profiles.

profile_id.name: Select a profile
profile_id.description: Required unless you provide Profile names. Select one or more managed Control D profiles by ID. If Profile IDs and Profile names are both provided, Profile IDs take precedence.

profile_name.name: Profile names
profile_name.description: Required unless you select a profile by ID. Enter one or more managed Control D profile names, separated by commas, such as Primary,Kids.

filter_id.name: Filter IDs
filter_id.description: Required unless you provide Filter names. Enter one or more raw Control D filter IDs, such as ads,x-community. If Filter IDs and Filter names are both provided, Filter IDs take precedence.

filter_name.name: Filter names
filter_name.description: Required unless you provide Filter IDs. Enter one or more user-facing Control D filter names, separated by commas, such as Ads & Trackers,Community List.

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: Turn the selected filters on or off for the targeted profiles.

config_entry_id.name: Configuration Entry ID
config_entry_id.description: Optional. Only needed when more than one Control D integration is loaded. If both Configuration Entry ID and Configuration Entry name are provided, Configuration Entry ID takes precedence.

config_entry_name.name: Configuration Entry name
config_entry_name.description: Optional. Only needed when more than one Control D integration is loaded and you are not using Configuration Entry ID.

set_rule_state.name: Set rule state
set_rule_state.description: Enable or disable one or more Control D custom rules by stable identity across the selected profiles, and optionally change their action mode, comment, or expiration. If Cancel expiration is set, it overrides Expiration duration and Expire at. Otherwise, Expire at takes precedence over Expiration duration.

profile_id.name: Select a profile
profile_id.description: Required unless you provide Profile names. Select one or more managed Control D profiles by ID. If Profile IDs and Profile names are both provided, Profile IDs take precedence.

profile_name.name: Profile names
profile_name.description: Required unless you select a profile by ID. Enter one or more managed Control D profile names, separated by commas, such as Primary,Kids.

rule_identity.name: Rule identities
rule_identity.description: Required. Enter one or more stable Control D rule identities, such as root|example.com or group:1|example2.com. You can also use a bare hostname such as example.com when it is unambiguous.

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: Optional. Turn the selected rules on or off for the targeted profiles. If omitted, the current enabled state is preserved.

mode.name: Mode
mode.description: Optional. Change the selected rules to block, bypass, or redirect. If omitted, the current rule action is preserved.

comment.name: Comment
comment.description: Optional. Replace the selected rule comment. Provide an empty string to clear it.

cancel_expiration.name: Cancel expiration
cancel_expiration.description: Optional. Cancel the current rule expiration. When set, this overrides Expiration duration and Expire at.

expiration_duration.name: Expiration duration
expiration_duration.description: Optional. Set the selected rules to expire after a relative duration such as 30 minutes. Ignored when Cancel expiration is set or when Expire at is also provided.

expire_at.name: Expire at
expire_at.description: Optional. Set the selected rules to expire at an absolute date and time in the Home Assistant local timezone. Ignored when Cancel expiration is set. When both Expiration duration and Expire at are provided, this field takes precedence. Past values are allowed.

config_entry_id.name: Configuration Entry ID
config_entry_id.description: Optional. Only needed when more than one Control D integration is loaded. If both Configuration Entry ID and Configuration Entry name are provided, Configuration Entry ID takes precedence.

config_entry_name.name: Configuration Entry name
config_entry_name.description: Optional. Only needed when more than one Control D integration is loaded and you are not using Configuration Entry ID.

set_service_state.name: Set service state
set_service_state.description: Set one or more Control D services to Off, Blocked, Bypassed, or Redirected across the selected profiles.

profile_id.name: Select a profile
profile_id.description: Required unless you provide Profile names. Select one or more managed Control D profiles by ID. If Profile IDs and Profile names are both provided, Profile IDs take precedence.

profile_name.name: Profile names
profile_name.description: Required unless you select a profile by ID. Enter one or more managed Control D profile names, separated by commas, such as Primary,Kids.

service_id.name: Service IDs
service_id.description: Required unless you provide Service names. Enter one or more raw Control D service IDs, such as amazonmusic. If Service IDs and Service names are both provided, Service IDs take precedence.

service_name.name: Service names
service_name.description: Required unless you provide Service IDs. Enter one or more user-facing Control D service names, separated by commas, such as Amazon Music.

mode.name: Mode
mode.description: Set the selected services to Off, Blocked, Bypassed, or Redirected.

config_entry_id.name: Configuration Entry ID
config_entry_id.description: Optional. Only needed when more than one Control D integration is loaded. If both Configuration Entry ID and Configuration Entry name are provided, Configuration Entry ID takes precedence.

config_entry_name.name: Configuration Entry name
config_entry_name.description: Optional. Only needed when more than one Control D integration is loaded and you are not using Configuration Entry ID.

set_option_state.name: Set option state
set_option_state.description: Set one or more Control D profile options across the selected profiles. Use Enabled for toggle-style options, or to turn select-style options off and on with their default value when available, otherwise the first available choice. Use Value when you need to choose a specific select-style option value.

profile_id.name: Select a profile
profile_id.description: Required unless you provide Profile names. Select one or more managed Control D profiles by ID. If Profile IDs and Profile names are both provided, Profile IDs take precedence.

profile_name.name: Profile names
profile_name.description: Required unless you select a profile by ID. Enter one or more managed Control D profile names, separated by commas, such as Primary,Kids.

option_id.name: Option IDs
option_id.description: Required unless you provide Option names. Enter one or more raw Control D option IDs, such as safesearch,ai_malware. If Option IDs and Option names are both provided, Option IDs take precedence.

option_name.name: Option names
option_name.description: Required unless you provide Option IDs. Enter one or more user-facing Control D option titles, separated by commas, such as Safe Search,AI Malware Filter.

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: Optional. Use this for toggle-style options, or to turn select-style options off and on with their default value when available, otherwise the first available choice.

value.name: Value
value.description: Optional. Use this when targeting select-style options and you need an explicit value. Enter the exact Home Assistant option label, such as Off, Standard, or Aggressive.

config_entry_id.name: Configuration Entry ID
config_entry_id.description: Optional. Only needed when more than one Control D integration is loaded. If both Configuration Entry ID and Configuration Entry name are provided, Configuration Entry ID takes precedence.

config_entry_name.name: Configuration Entry name
config_entry_name.description: Optional. Only needed when more than one Control D integration is loaded and you are not using Configuration Entry ID.

set_default_rule_state.name: Set default rule state
set_default_rule_state.description: Set the Control D default-rule behavior to Blocking, Bypassing, or Redirecting across the selected profiles.

profile_id.name: Select a profile
profile_id.description: Required unless you provide Profile names. Select one or more managed Control D profiles by ID. If Profile IDs and Profile names are both provided, Profile IDs take precedence.

profile_name.name: Profile names
profile_name.description: Required unless you select a profile by ID. Enter one or more managed Control D profile names, separated by commas, such as Primary,Kids.

mode.name: Mode
mode.description: Set the selected profiles to Blocking, Bypassing, or Redirecting as their default query action.

config_entry_id.name: Configuration Entry ID
config_entry_id.description: Optional. Only needed when more than one Control D integration is loaded. If both Configuration Entry ID and Configuration Entry name are provided, Configuration Entry ID takes precedence.

config_entry_name.name: Configuration Entry name
config_entry_name.description: Optional. Only needed when more than one Control D integration is loaded and you are not using Configuration Entry ID.

get_catalog.name: Get catalog
get_catalog.description: Return a copyable catalog of filters, services, rules, or profile options for the selected Control D scope.

catalog_type.name: Catalog type
catalog_type.description: Select which Control D catalog to return.

profile_id.name: Select a profile
profile_id.description: Optional. Select one or more managed Control D profiles by ID. If Profile IDs and Profile names are both provided, Profile IDs take precedence. Leave both profile selectors empty to return all managed profiles in the selected config entry scope.

profile_name.name: Profile names
profile_name.description: Optional. Enter one or more managed Control D profile names, separated by commas, such as Primary,Kids. Leave both profile selectors empty to return all managed profiles in the selected config entry scope.

config_entry_id.name: Configuration Entry ID
config_entry_id.description: Optional. Only needed when more than one Control D integration is loaded. If both Configuration Entry ID and Configuration Entry name are provided, Configuration Entry ID takes precedence.

config_entry_name.name: Configuration Entry name
config_entry_name.description: Optional. Only needed when more than one Control D integration is loaded and you are not using Configuration Entry ID.

state.purpose_instance_action: Runs an on-demand synchronization for this Control D account

state.purpose_endpoint_status: Shows whether this endpoint is currently considered active based on the configured inactivity threshold

state.purpose_instance_status: Shows the current refresh health and account status for this Control D integration

state.purpose_instance_summary: Shows a summary count for the current Control D account
Shows a summary count for the current Control D account

state.purpose_profile_filter_mode: Changes the enforcement mode for the selected profile filter

state.purpose_profile_service: Changes the action applied to the selected Control D service

state.purpose_profile_default_rule: Changes the default action used for queries that do not match a more specific profile rule

state.purpose_profile_rule_group: Changes the folder-wide action for the selected custom rule folder

state.purpose_profile_option: Changes the selected Control D profile option

state.purpose_profile_pause: Temporarily disables or enables the selected Control D profile

state.purpose_profile_filter: Enables or disables the selected Control D profile filter

state.purpose_profile_option: Enables or disables the selected Control D profile option

state.purpose_profile_rule: Enables or disables the selected custom profile rule
